title: Pricing methods
summary: 9609 AS — cost-based, market-based, and psychological pricing.
learningObjectives: Select pricing for given business contexts.

simpleExplanation.title: What customers pay
simpleExplanation.summary: Price must cover costs, match competition, and reflect brand position. Method depends on objectives and market conditions.
steps: Cost-plus: add mark-up to unit cost.
Penetration: low price to gain share.

sections.content: **Pricing methods** (3.3.4) links **5.4 costing** later. Match **method to objective** (growth vs profit).
